phasePlan.objective: Keep the existing route-progress DSK consumption executable through engine.n.genericRouteProgress while blocking a premature route-cargo executable claim.
mustRemainTrue: Next Ledge does not import createGenericRouteCargoExtractionKit yet
canonical replay status remains planned-fixture for traversal-cargo-pressure

phasePlan.objective: Replace the standalone route-progress kit with generic-route-cargo-extraction-kit only when a concrete cargo/resource/pressure ledger can be removed from host code rather than invented as route fiction.
requiredProof: route checkpoints still flow through engine.n.genericRouteProgress
cargo/resource deltas flow through engine.n.genericResourceLoop via the composite facade
pressure deltas flow through engine.n.genericPressureLoop via the composite facade
domain snapshots expose routeProgress plus routeCargoExtraction without renderer or browser APIs

phasePlan.objective: Promote traversal-cargo-pressure from planned-fixture only after a browserless replay imports real Core plus ProtoKits, advances fixed ticks, and compares deterministic route/cargo/pressure descriptor digests.
requiredProof: no DOM, Canvas, WebGL, Three.js, pointer lock, browser audio, asset loading, wall-clock, RNG, or animation-frame dependency in reusable kit logic

nextPatchGate: Do not migrate source to createGenericRouteCargoExtractionKit until the patch removes or centralizes real cargo/resource/pressure bookkeeping and adds a route-level fixed-tick replay or spec smoke proving route/cargo/pressure descriptors together.
localJsReductionClaim: none-yet-for-composite; this is guard/plan hardening only
